evaluators.name: Bookmark Three Beginner Wi‑Fi Security Articles to Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user bookmarked at least three beginner Wi‑Fi Security articles (>=2023, <=8 min reading time) into the default Reading List.

evaluators.name: Bookmark Most-Commented VPN Setup Guide to Practice Later Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that, among the top two most-commented VPN setup how-to guides, the user bookmarked the one with more comments into the Practice Later collection.

evaluators.name: Add Best Password Manager Review to Research Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that, among password manager review articles tagged with both Security Tools and Account Security, the user added the one with the largest first recommendation list (>=3 tools) to the Research collection.

evaluators.name: Comment and Copy Link on Short Popular Phishing Article Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user copied the link of the shortest qualifying phishing article (<=10 minutes, >=10 upvotes) and posted a new comment of at least 15 characters on that same article.

evaluators.name: Configure OSINT Weekly On-site and Disable Malware Notifications Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that OSINT notifications are set to weekly on-site alerts and Malware notifications are fully disabled.

evaluators.name: Add Newest 2024 Intermediate CTF Write-up to Weekend Practice and Mark In Progress Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the newest intermediate 2024 CTF write-up with at least 5 upvotes is in a new 'Weekend Practice' collection and its reading status is set to In progress.

evaluators.name: Open First Four Parts of Most Popular Web App Security Series Evaluator
evaluators.description: Uses instrumentation to check that the most popular Web Application Security series was opened and that parts 1 through 4 of that series were opened.

evaluators.name: Rate Top Tools Article 4 Stars with Detailed Feedback Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the highest-rated Tools category article received a 4-star feedback from the user with at least two feedback reasons selected and a comment of at least 20 characters.
